## What

Brief description of what this change does.

## Why

Why this change is needed. Link to the issue or discussion that motivated it.

## How

How the change works, if the implementation is non-obvious. Architecture decisions or tradeoffs worth calling out.

## Testing

How this was tested. Unit tests, integration tests, manual verification steps.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] No em dashes in any file
- [ ] Structured logging (no `fmt.Println` or bare `print()` in service code)
- [ ] Metrics added for new observable behavior
- [ ] Config values have documented defaults
- [ ] If this is a contract change: contract gate CI check passes

## Related

Issues, ADRs, or PRs this relates to.
